rationale: Each benchmark dimension produces a score in [0, 100]. Scoring rubrics are explicit — no subjective evaluation. Benchmark results must be reproducible from the same prompt set.

metrics.name: Answer-first rate
metrics.method: Check if response begins with direct answer, not preamble

metrics.name: Prohibited pattern absence
metrics.method: Count filler affirmations. Score = 10 * (1 - min(count/3, 1))

metrics.name: Length compliance
metrics.method: output_tokens / target_tokens. Score = 10 if ratio in [0.5, 1.5] else 0

metrics.name: Framework application
metrics.method: Does response name and apply a reasoning framework? Score 20 if yes.

metrics.name: Assumption surfacing
metrics.method: Count explicit assumptions stated. Score = min(count * 5, 15).

metrics.name: Uncertainty calibration
metrics.method: Count [verify] tags vs actual uncertain facts. Score = 15 if all uncertain facts tagged, else proportional.

metrics.name: Structure completeness
metrics.method: Check coverage: Requirements, Constraints, Components, Interfaces, Failure Modes, Trade-offs. Score = covered/6 * 30.

metrics.name: Trade-off explicitness
metrics.method: Does response quantify or qualify the main trade-off? Score 20 if yes.

metrics.name: Syntax correctness
metrics.method: Run lint or parse. Score 40 if zero errors.

metrics.name: Test coverage present
metrics.method: Does response include or reference tests? Score 10 if yes.

metrics.name: Relevant memory loaded
metrics.method: For sessions with prior context, verify response references relevant prior decision. Score 25 if yes.

metrics.name: No stale memory injected
metrics.method: Verify no memory items older than TTL are cited. Score 25 if clean.

metrics.name: Citation rate when RAG used
metrics.method: Count turns where RAG was activated. Score = (cited_turns / rag_turns) * 50.

metrics.name: Planner activation accuracy
metrics.method: Did planner activate on > 3 step tasks and skip on single-step tasks? Score = correct_activations / total_tasks * 50.

metrics.name: Reflection on mandatory task classes
metrics.method: Verify reflection ran for all architecture/security/complex_code tasks. Score = reflected / mandatory * 50.

metrics.name: Critic on high-risk tasks
metrics.method: Verify critic ran for all irreversible architecture and security-critical tasks. Score = critiqued / mandatory * 50.

metrics.name: Minimum tools principle
metrics.method: Count unnecessary tool calls (tool called when answer was in context). Score = 50 - (unnecessary_calls * 10).

metrics.name: Batching compliance
metrics.method: Verify all tool calls preceded single NIM call. Score 50 if 100% batched.

metrics.name: Contradiction rate
metrics.method: Count turns where response contradicts earlier decision without explicit override. Score = 50 * (1 - contradiction_rate).

metrics.name: Compression trigger accuracy
metrics.method: Verify compression activates at turn 15+. Score 25 if yes.

metrics.name: Context budget compliance
metrics.method: Verify context never exceeds 65536 tokens. Score 25 if always compliant.

scoring.rationale: 70/100 minimum reflects production standard. A failing dimension score must be investigated and remediated before the runtime can be considered Sprint A complete.
